headline: Alexa Plus is getting an AI update to handle more complicated instructions
summary: Alexa Plus is receiving an AI update for advanced smart home control. The update allows connection with numerous smart home brands like Bosch and iRobot. It will automatically route complex requests to compatible devices.

headline: The Echo Show 21 is a great smart home hub that’s $80 off
summary: Amazon's Echo Show 21 is a multi-functional smart device, combining a calendar, TV, and hub. It features a large 21-inch screen for controlling smart lights, recipes, and watching TV. Currently, the Echo Show 21 is available for $80 off at Best Buy and Home.

headline: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr’s war on the First Amendment
summary: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr is accused of suppressing free speech rights of broadcasters. He reportedly used his authority to threaten broadcasters joking about President Trump. This raises concerns about the First Amendment and media oversight.

headline: Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
summary: Anthropic's Claude AI now offers voice mode for its more powerful Opus and Sonnet models. Previously, voice mode was exclusive to the faster, less powerful Claude Haiku. The feature is also expanding into apps like Gmail, Slack, and Canva.

headline: Save Up to 48% Off VITURE's XR Glasses, Which Project a Room Filling Virtual Display for Movies and Games
summary: VITURE XR Glasses are on sale, offering up to 48% off. They project a massive 175-inch virtual display for movies and gaming. Compatible with devices like Steam Deck, Nintendo Switch 2, and Xbox Ally X.

headline: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 Review So Far
summary: This article provides an initial review of the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8. It likely covers early impressions and features of the new foldable phone. Details on performance, design, and camera are expected.

headline: After the Avengers Fall, Marvel Will Introduce the Maximum X-Men | Comic Con 2026
summary: Marvel's Avengers: Armageddon event will lead to the fall of Earth's Mightiest Heroes. A new team of mutant heroes, the Maximum X-Men, will rise to fill the void. This announcement was made at Comic Con 2026.

headline: Avatar: Seven Havens Gets Paramount+ Release Date and Teaser Trailer | Comic Con 2026
summary: Avatar: Seven Havens is set to premiere exclusively on Paramount+ on October 9. Paramount announced the release date and a new teaser trailer. The news broke at the Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender panel at San Diego Comic-Con 2026.

headline: Burnham pauses plan to release some prisoners early from September
summary: Prime Minister Burnham has halted plans for early prisoner release. The pause is effective from September and will last until a review is complete. No prisoners will be released early during this review period.

headline: Mum and daughter who died at beach were trying to save boy, 7
summary: Shally Rahman and Samiha Rahman tragically died at a beach. Emergency services confirm they were pulled from the water. Reports indicate they were attempting to save a 7-year-old boy.

headline: US announces tariffs on dozens of trade partners over 'forced labour' imports
summary: The US has imposed tariffs on approximately 60 trade partners. Tariffs are due to claims of failure to prevent forced labor imports. This move addresses human rights concerns in global supply chains.

headline: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
summary: Brent crude oil prices surged past $100 per barrel. This marks the first time prices have hit this level since May. The increase is attributed to the escalating war in the Middle East.
